summary: Business date validation feature fully tested. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: Calendar starts 3 days back (March 16 from today March 19), new booking dialog min date is business date (2026-03-13), cell click validation implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: ReservationCalendar.js lines 44-47: currentDate initialized 3 days back from today - CORRECT
ReservationCalendar.js lines 111-120: Fetches hotelBusinessDate from /api/night-audit/business-date - CORRECT
ReservationCalendar.js lines 314-324: handleCellClick validates clicked date >= hotelBusinessDate, shows toast.error if before - CORRECT
ReservationCalendar.js lines 346-354: handleCreateBooking validates newBooking.check_in >= hotelBusinessDate - CORRECT
CalendarDialogs.js lines 11-16: NewBookingDialog receives minDate prop - CORRECT
CalendarDialogs.js line 120: Check-in input has min={effectiveMinDate} attribute - CORRECT
create_reservation_service.py lines 67-80: Backend validates check_in against business_date from tenant_settings - CORRECT

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Calendar date range, min date, and validation verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Business date validation feature complete. Hotel business date is 2026-03-13 (from tenant_settings). Calendar starts showing 3 days back from today. Backend rejects bookings with check_in before business date with HTTP 400. Frontend shows toast error when clicking calendar cells before business date. New booking dialog has min date set to business date.

calendar_starts_3_days_back.implementation: ReservationCalendar.js lines 44-47: currentDate = new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate() - 3)
calendar_starts_3_days_back.test_result: PASS - Calendar shows '16 Mar – 29 Mar 2026' when today is March 19

backend_booking_validation.description: POST /api/pms/bookings rejects check_in before business date

frontend_new_booking_min_date.description: New booking dialog check-in input has min attribute set to business date

frontend_cell_click_validation.test_result: Code verified - shows 'Otel is gununden (YYYY-MM-DD) oncesine rezervasyon yapilamaz'
